sections.markdown:
- Prefer skipping Saturday basketball this week while the Achilles is settling.
- If you play, treat it as a controlled shootaround only: no hard cuts, sprints, contests, jumping volume, or extra games.
- Stop at the first sign that the Achilles is changing your push-off or landing mechanics.
- If basketball happens at anything beyond controlled shootaround, cap Sunday at short easy running or replace it with rest.
